name: NGO and Non-Profit (Zimbabwe)
definition: Non-profit organisations delivering development, humanitarian, faith-based and community programmes: local NGOs, international NGO country offices, trusts, faith organisations and community-based organisations.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Single-programme NGOs with a small secretariat.
National programmes and international country offices.

officialSizeThresholds.note: No official organisation-size classification was verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. Legal-form and registration regimes (PVO, trust, common-law association) are declared as research gaps rather than described; entity-form choice needs professional advice.
